plan.failureSummary: The test failed because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that was absent from the current UI, which instead displayed a 'Your Name' field.
observedIndicators: Failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' with 'Your Name' field
Tool call attempted to find 'Last Name' selectors ([data-testid='input-lastname'])
Historical pass rate of ~50% with alternating success/failure pattern suggests UI rotation flakiness

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: The deterministic cache is stale due to a UI layout change. Deleting the cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the 'Set 2' form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic mode for this test if UI rotation is a persistent feature.
remediationSteps.details: Since the application intentionally rotates its UI, deterministic mode may be unsuitable for this test. Consider disabling cache for this specific flow to ensure it always adapts to the current UI set.

plan.notes: The application appears to be designed with rotating UI layouts (labeled 'Set 2' in the failure screenshot). Because the test was running in DETERMINISTIC mode, it used cached selectors from a previous successful run (likely 'Set 1') that included a 'Last Name' field. The autonomous agent can easily handle either layout if the cache is cleared, as the semantic intent 'Fill out all survey questions' is flexible.
